content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 WARN — User-visible toggle subtitle says "Experimental: may be unstable and lose sort order" (App/SettingsView.swift:12), which may trigger review questions about shipping an unfinished feature.
Pierre: Apple's guideline 2.2 rejects apps that present themselves as betas, trials, or incomplete builds, and reviewers do open Settings screens. The store metadata is clean (description.txt, release_notes.txt), but the in-app label explicitly calls AI Sort "experimental" and "unstable," which reads as work-in-progress copy. Consider rewording to a neutral disclosure (e.g., "AI Sort may occasionally reorder messages") or removing the instability warning before submission.
